name: wins-13578-pr-review
description: Check PR readiness for WINS-13578: verify empty XLF files, pipeline branch, and draft team message

members.name: xlf-checker
members.prompt:
You are part of team "wins-13578-pr-review". Your name is "xlf-checker".

TASK: Check empty XLF translation files in the websites monorepo and assess their impact.

Working directory: /home/yspies/projects/frontend/websites

Steps:
1. Find ALL messages.xlf files in apps/inshared-de/spa/ and apps/inshared-nl/spa/ (login, logout, my-zone)
2. Read each one to check if they have empty body tags
3. Find and read the ES equivalents in apps/inshared-es/spa/ to compare
4. Look for any translation sync configuration (POEditor, i18n scripts, etc.) that explains how translations get populated
5. Check if there's any Angular i18n extract command in package.json or nx workspace

Report back with:
- Which files are empty vs have content
- Whether ES equivalents are also empty or have translations
- Whether this is expected/okay for new apps

After completing your research, update task #1 as completed using TaskUpdate, and send a message to "team-lead" with your findings.
